verifier_values.criteria: States that the first time code 90834 was utilised to file a claim is 2013 (acceptable range 199 to 203)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that the first time code 90834 was utilised to file a claim is a value other than 2013
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
Create a pivot with Row headers as the 7 codes, Years as the column heads and SUM of column "PAYMENT" as values.

Based on the pivot table, we can clear see the first year where the code "90834" has non-zero value is for the year 2013.

verifier_values.criteria: States that the CAGR of total payments between 2018-2022 is 0.99% (acceptable range 0.98% to 1.0%)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that the CAGR of total payments between 2018-2022 is a value other than 0.99%
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
CAGR of last 5 years = Growth rate of total payment value between year 2018-2022.

As per the pivot table-
Total payment value in 2018 =  1,046,570,493 
Total payment value in 2022 =  1,088,810,087 

Based on the formula = RRI (4,  1,046,570,493,  1,088,810,087), we get CAGR as 0.994%.

verifier_values.criteria: States that the total payment value in 2030 is $1,178,472,451 (acceptable range $1,166,687,726 to $1,190,257,176)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that the total payment value in 2030 is a value other than $1,178,472,451
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
To estimate the total payment value for 2030, for which we need to extrapolate using CAGR of last 5 years as recommended in the prompt.

CAGR as 0.994% (as per criteria 7)

Using that to estimate, we get total payment value in 2030 as  1,178,472,451.

verifier_values.criteria: States that the cost of insurance for the client in 2030 is $58,923,624 (acceptable range $58,334,388 to $59,512,860)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that the cost of insurance for the client in 2030 is a value other than $58,923,624
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
Total payment value in 2030 as  1,178,472,451. (as per criteria 8)

As per prompt, our client has a 10% share in that, and of that, 50% is borne by them as insurance cost.

So net insurance cost for hospital in 2030 = 1,178,472,451 * 10% * 50%
=  $58,923,623.53 
=$58,923,624 (Rounded off as per prompt instructions)

verifier_values.criteria: States that the percentage ratio of claim to payment for code 90837 is 75.19% (acceptable range 74.44% to 75.94%)

verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
Payment to percentage claim ratio for each code.

Using the pivot table, we calculate the sum of "Allowed Charges" and "Payment" for each code. we get the following-

Code |	Sum of ALLOWED CHARGES	| Sum of PAYMENT
90791 |	 1,083,443,407 	 | 799,157,502 
90792	|  792,121,307 	 | 582,931,539 
90832 |  1,351,053,744 	| 1,005,731,648

90837	 | 6,124,524,287 	| 4,604,945,222 
90839	 | 22,356,822 	| 16,858,079 
90840	 | 3,951,460 	 | 3,066,626

Code	| Payment to Claim Ratio percentage
90791	| 73.76%
90792	| 73.59%
90832	| 74.44%
90834	| 73.74%
90837	| 75.19%
90839	| 75.40%
90840	| 77.61%
